summary: Wrote technical design for task-1775619047998 (Fix agentic-core symlink and broken tests). The design identifies the root cause: package.json has `agentic-core: link:../agentic-core` pointing to the wrong standalone project instead of `link:./packages/agentic-core`. Fix is: 1) change the symlink path in package.json, 2) run pnpm install, 3) verify all 174 tests pass. Also confirmed milestone m27 already has dbb.md and design.md, and the other 2 todo tasks (1775615948444, 1775615948484) already have design.md files.
